CustomField.description: The system will mark an Assembly Event as incomplete if the following details are missing: Associated Event, TSN/CSN at Event, and Release Date. Once the Associated Event is populated, either the TSN/CSN or the Release Date (depending on the intervals set in the associated event) will be used to determine whether the event is considered complete.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND(NOT(ISNULL(leaseworks__Projected_Event__c)) , OR(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Projected_Event__r.leaseworks__Maintenance_Program_Event__c), ISNULL(leaseworks__Projected_Event__r.leaseworks__Maintenance_Program_Event__c))) , IF( (NOT(ISNULL(leaseworks__Projected_Event__r.leaseworks__Custom_Interval_Cycles__c)) && ISNULL(leaseworks__CSN__c)),true, IF( (NOT(ISNULL(leaseworks__Projected_Event__r.leaseworks__Custom_Interval_Hours__c)) && ISNULL(leaseworks__TSN__c)),true, IF( (NOT(ISNULL(leaseworks__Projected_Event__r.leaseworks__Custom_Interval_Months__c)) && ISNULL( leaseworks__End_Date__c )),true, IF( (ISNULL(leaseworks__Projected_Event__r.leaseworks__Custom_Interval_Months__c)) && (ISNULL(leaseworks__Projected_Event__r.leaseworks__Custom_Interval_Hours__c)) && (ISNULL(leaseworks__Projected_Event__r.leaseworks__Custom_Interval_Cycles__c)) && ISNULL( leaseworks__End_Date__c ),true, false )))) , IF( (NOT(ISNULL(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Maintenance_Program_Event__r.leaseworks__Interval_2_Cycles__c)) && ISNULL(leaseworks__CSN__c)),true, IF( (NOT(ISNULL(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Maintenance_Program_Event__r.leaseworks__Interval_2_Hours__c)) && ISNULL(leaseworks__TSN__c)),true, IF( (NOT(ISNULL(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Maintenance_Program_Event__r.leaseworks__Interval_2_Months__c)) && ISNULL( leaseworks__End_Date__c )),true, IF( NOT(ISNULL(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Maintenance_Program_Event__c)) && (ISNULL(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Maintenance_Program_Event__r.leaseworks__Interval_2_Months__c)) && (ISNULL(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Maintenance_Program_Event__r.leaseworks__Interval_2_Hours__c)) && (ISNULL(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Maintenance_Program_Event__r.leaseworks__Interval_2_Cycles__c)) && ISNULL( leaseworks__End_Date__c ),true, IF( ISNULL(leaseworks__Projected_Event__c) && ISNULL(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Maintenance_Program_Event__c) , IF(ISNULL( leaseworks__End_Date__c ) , true, false), false) )))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The system will mark an Assembly Event as incomplete if the following details are missing: Associated Event, TSN/CSN at Event, and Release Date. Once the Associated Event is populated, either the TSN/CSN or the Release Date (depending on the intervals set in the associated event) will be used to determine whether the event is considered complete.
CustomField.label: Incomplete
